description_long: This is a sleek, modern light jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are straight with slight upward-angled winglets at the tips, and the engines are mounted above the wings on short pylons. The tail features a distinctive T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, featuring a large, dark-tinted windshield and several side windows for visibility. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible beneath the wings. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and dark gray, with some metallic accents and visible registration markings on the tail.
description: A modern light jet airplane with a low-wing, T-tail design, above-wing engines, and a sleek white and gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, wide wingspan with upward winglets, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the above-wing engine, cockpit windows, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engines above the wings, the T-tail, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine placement, cockpit, and tail details similar to the left side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and upward-angled winglets; slight dihedral angle present.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings on pylons.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and large, dark-tinted windows.
